inputs.text: A stunning Korean idol-style woman with platinum blonde fluffy wolf cut, oval face and monolid eyes, standing on the weathered stone steps of a misty mountain temple at dawn. She wears a sheer mesh layered avant-garde outfit with flowing translucent panels catching the mountain breeze. Her expression is warm and approachable, lips curved in a gentle knowing smile, one hand resting on an ancient wooden railing. Shot on 85mm f/1.4 with creamy bokeh dissolving the fog-wrapped pine trees behind her. Slight low angle looking up, empowering composition. Ring light beauty lighting creates flawless porcelain skin glow against the moody atmospheric haze. Medium shot capturing temple architecture context. Cinematic film grain, dramatic shadows pooling in temple corridors. Styled dewy makeup with gradient coral lips.
lowres, blurry, bad anatomy, watermark, signature, oversaturated, harsh lighting, plastic skin
